name: a rusty sword
description: An old iron sword, pitted with rust. Still sharp enough to cut.

name: some gold coins
description: A small handful of gold coins, warm from the sun.

name: a small pouch
description: A leather pouch just big enough to hold a handful of odds and ends. (+5 slots)

name: a leather helm
description: A simple helmet of boiled leather. Better than nothing.

name: a wooden shield
description: A round shield reinforced with iron rivets.

name: a leather satchel
description: A sturdy satchel with many interior pockets. (+10 slots)

name: an iron ring
description: A plain iron band with no markings.

name: a wool cloak
description: A thick dark cloak, perfect for cold nights.
